chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2538 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.13419/2025 2. For orders on CMA No.11864/2025 3. For hearing of main case 14.10.2025 Mr. Zohaib Zulfiqar Sarki, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajer, advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Muhammad Saad Siddiqui, advocate for respondent No.3 Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Ali Akbar Sahito, Deputy Director (Law) PTA. Per learned counsel for the petitioner the subsisting controversy is with respect to show cause notice dated 25.06.2025. Learned counsel seeks that the notice be adjudicated vide speaking order after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and in the interim period no further coercive action be taken there-against. Learned counsel for respondents articulate no cavil to the aforesaid and state that the petition be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of. Judge Judge Amjad
